name: OAuth Token Refresh
description: Reserved manual scenario for validating live /v1/oauth/token refresh behavior when credentials are intentionally forced to refresh.
expectedBehavior: The flow produces a refresh request with the expected OAuth beta composition, entrypoint, and auth header mode.
notes: Trigger a real credential refresh with explicit command templates or a manual wrapper before promoting this scenario.
The default prompt-based runner skips this scenario unless it is selected explicitly.
